## ✨ Feature Description

> Describe the feature you'd like to add.

## 🎯 Motivation

> Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve for the user?

## 📐 Proposed Solution

> How do you imagine this being implemented?

## 🎨 UI Reference (if applicable)

<!-- Add a sketch, wireframe, or reference design -->

## 📱 Affected Screens / Flows

<!-- Which screens or user flows would be impacted? -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

> Any alternative approaches you've thought of?
